meta.title: HCR2 Adventure Guide Data
notes: English names are used for all vehicles and maps.
This file is intentionally structured for easy manual editing.
All setups are placeholder entries so every selected map and vehicle combination works immediately.

maps.name: Forest
maps.description: Balanced forest terrain where grip, rhythm and stable landings matter.

maps.name: Countryside
maps.description: Rolling hills and bridges that reward flow, pace and smooth control.

maps.name: Desert
maps.description: Loose-feeling terrain with momentum management over sharp transitions.

maps.name: Beach
maps.description: Open coastal terrain where traction and pace carry your run.

maps.name: Backwater Bog
maps.description: Messy swamp-style terrain with awkward transitions and recovery moments.

maps.name: Glacier
maps.description: Cold and slippery terrain where stability and precise inputs are valuable.

maps.name: Gloomvale
maps.description: Dark valley terrain with technical sections that punish mistakes.

maps.name: Sky Rock Outpost
maps.description: High-altitude rocky route with jumps, edges and unstable landings.

maps.name: Intense City
maps.description: Urban-style adventure map with fast sections and punishing impacts.

maps.name: Forest Trials
maps.description: A more technical forest route focused on precision and consistency.

maps.name: Raging Winter
maps.description: Harsh winter terrain that rewards grip and careful landing control.

maps.name: Patchwork Plant
maps.description: Industrial mixed-surface map with frequent pace changes.

maps.name: Racer Glacier
maps.description: A faster glacier profile where control still matters at speed.

maps.name: Desert Valley
maps.description: A longer desert-style route where momentum and stable setups shine.
